name: Cheese Pineapple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and cornstarch in a small saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens.
3. Add 2 eggs to the saucepan one at a time, beating after each addition.
4. Blend in milk and vanilla extract.
5. If the mixture appears slightly curdled, do not worry - it will bake out.
6. Spread the cooled pineapple layer over the bottom of the pie shell.
7. Pour the cream cheese mixture over the pineapple layer.
8. Sprinkle pecans evenly over the top.
9. Bake at 400°F for 10 minutes.
10. Reduce heat to 325°F and continue baking for an additional 50 minutes.
11. Allow the pie to cool before serving.
